message:
test(serve): improve coverage for middleware, JWT parsing, RSA, response helpers (bd-umusf)

Push 8 functions to 100%: corsMiddlewareFunc, authMiddlewareFunc,
loggingMiddleware, writeErrorResponse, writeSuccessResponse, parseJWT,
claimInt64, parseRSAPublicKey. Also improve authenticateRequest and
authenticateAPIKey coverage. Serve overall 58.2% → 58.7%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
